# Coratech AI — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models and search engines understand this website.

# Company Overview
Coratech AI is an enterprise technology company founded in Accra, Ghana, with operations across London and beyond. Part of Canmore Digital. Founded by Lawrencia Peasah Yeboah and Ernest Kwame Adjei.

We build AI systems, automation platforms, compliance infrastructure and digital solutions for enterprise organisations in financial services, healthcare, legal, logistics, government, education, insurance, manufacturing and retail.

# What We Do
- AI Automation: Document processing, workflow routing, approvals and data entry automation
- AI Agents: Autonomous multi-agent systems that plan, reason and take action across enterprise systems
- Enterprise Software: Full-stack application development, microservices and legacy modernisation
- Data Intelligence: Data warehouses, analytics pipelines, BI dashboards and predictive models
- Compliance Systems: KYC/AML workflows, regulatory monitoring, audit trail management
- Cloud Infrastructure: Multi-cloud architecture, Kubernetes, Terraform and FinOps
- Digital Transformation: Technology readiness assessment, roadmap planning and change management

# Industries Served
Financial Services, Healthcare, Legal Services, Logistics and Supply Chain, Real Estate, Government and Public Sector, Education, Insurance, Manufacturing, Retail and E-Commerce

# Key Facts
- Founded: Accra, Ghana
- Operations: Ghana, London, and globally
- Parent company: Canmore Digital
- Contact: hello@coratech.com
- Phone Ghana: +233 53 602 6175
- Phone UK: +44 783 295 6639

# Technology Stack
AI/ML: GPT-4, Claude API, LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, Hugging Face, PyTorch
Data: Snowflake, dbt, Apache Kafka, Databricks, Apache Airflow
Cloud: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker
Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, Python, Go, PostgreSQL, Redis

# Compliance and Security
SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, HIPAA Compliant, GDPR Ready, FedRAMP Authorised
